race.comment: POLYMER (2) went under narrowly for the new yard first-up, then demolished his rivals in the heavy going with a dominant win over 1200m at this track. Gets a better set-up here and Looker sticks. Hard to stop. EXCEED ME (5) consistent gelding who stretches out to the 1200m for the first time today. Gave his all when leading early in the small field before tiring late to secure second over 1000m at this track. Has his share of talent and comes here deep into the prep. GRAVEL ROAD (1) comes back a few levels today and can finish over the top of these with the winkers going on. Covered ground early and was found wanting in the straight when seventh over 1250m at Newcastle in BM64 class. Won't find this as tough and gets his chance. RIVER BISCOTTE (9) got off the mark at start eleven with a slick first-up Maiden win over 1006m at this track. Gets map favours today and proven at the trip. PREDICT THE FUTURE (8) progressive gelding with genuine claims at the weights.
